signup_subtitle: 10 su'aalood oo bilaash ah bishii kasta — kaadh looma baahna
signup_subtitle_pos: Waxaad dejinaysaa POS oo keliya — waxaad ka bilaabaysaa qorshaha Bilaashka ah, qorshe aasaasi lama baahna
send_magic_link: Halkan beddelkeeda dir xiriirka sixirka ah
age_confirm: Markaad akoon samaynayso waxaad xaqiijinaysaa inaad tahay 13+ (16 gudaha EU/UK).
consent_details: Waxaad oggolaanaysaa in xogta loo isticmaalo aragtiyaha ganacsi ee AI ku shaqeeya, oo ay ku jiraan: falanqaynta faylasha la soo geliyay, goobaynta juqraafi ee ku salaysan IP si loo ogaado lacagta, iyo astaamo POS ikhtiyaari ah sida sawir-qaadista kamaradda, raadraaca gaarsiinta, iyo lacag-bixinta lacagta mobiilka (M-Pesa, MTN, Airtel). Sawirrada kamaradda waxaa loo habeeyaa wakhti dhab ah, waligoodna lama kaydiyo. Fiiri
shopify_subtitle: Soo gal ama samayso akoon AskBiz oo bilaash ah si aad ugu xirto dukaankaaga Shopify oo aad u bilowdo falanqaynta xogtaada.
err_accept_terms: Waa inaad oggolaataa Shuruudaha iyo Siyaasadda Asturnaanta si aad u samaysato akoon.
err_email_exists: Akoon leh iimaylkan ayaa hore u jiray. Halkan beddelkeeda isku day soo galitaanka, ama isticmaal xiriir sixir ah.
err_magic_failed: Waa laga fashilmay diritaanka xiriirka sixirka ah
ok_check_inbox: Fiiri sanduuqaaga {email} — guji xiriirka si aad u firfircooneyso akoonkaaga.
ok_magic_sent: Xiriirka sixirka ah waxaa loo diray {email} — fiiri sanduuqaaga.
signup_credentials_heading: Sida aad u soo geli doonto
phone_hint: Isticmaal lambarka aad ganacsigaaga ku maamusho. SMS looma baahna — kaliya deji PIN 4-god ah oo cusub oo AskBiz ah.
err_invalid_phone: Geli lambar taleefan sax ah, tusaale 0712 345678 ama +254712345678
err_pin_mismatch: PIN-nadu isku mid ma aha — hubi oo isku day mar kale
passkey_nudge_title: Markaada xigta si dhaqso leh u soo gal
passkey_nudge_body: Ku dar passkey si aad u soo gasho wejigaaga ama farahaaga — PIN ama fure sir ah oo aad xasuusato uma baahnid.
passkey_nudge_dont_remind: Mar dambe ha i tusin tan
